context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements automated Zendesk ticket creation from order events, using proper authentication, attaching the order ID as a custom field, applying the correct tags, and normalizing customer emails before lookup.

checklist.name: Basic auth format
checklist.description: Uses Basic authentication with Buffer.from(`${email}/token:${token}`).toString('base64') pattern (i.e., email/token: prefix in the base64-encoded credentials)

checklist.name: Order ID custom field
checklist.description: Attaches the order ID to the ticket via a custom_fields array entry using a configurable field ID (environment variable), not as a tag or body text alone

checklist.name: auto-created tag
checklist.description: Includes 'auto-created' tag on every programmatically created ticket

checklist.name: Event-specific tag
checklist.description: Includes an event-specific tag (e.g., 'delivery-failure') on the ticket, distinct from 'auto-created'

checklist.name: order-ID tag
checklist.description: Includes a tag in the format 'order-{orderId}' on the ticket

checklist.name: Email normalization
checklist.description: Normalizes the customer email to lowercase before any database lookup (e.g., .toLowerCase() or equivalent)

checklist.name: Zendesk API endpoint
checklist.description: Uses the correct Zendesk REST API URL pattern: https://{subdomain}.zendesk.com/api/v2/tickets.json with POST method

checklist.name: Ticket priority field
checklist.description: Sets a priority field on the ticket (one of: urgent, high, normal, low)

checklist.name: Requester by email
checklist.description: Sets the ticket requester using the customer's email address (requester: { email: ... })

checklist.name: Server-side token
checklist.description: API token is used only server-side (no client-side exposure); the implementation is an HTTP handler/endpoint, not client-side JavaScript

checklist.name: Includes order detail in body
checklist.description: The ticket body/comment includes relevant order information (order number, carrier, tracking number, or failure date)

checklist.name: No new customer on webhook
checklist.description: Does NOT create a new customer record when processing the event — looks up existing customer by email only
